Index.title: Libreng Online Tools para sa mga Pinoy
Index.subtitle: Mga saktong calculator, generator, ug uban pang utilities nga gihimo gyud para sa Pilipinas.

SalaryCalculator.grossSalaryHint: Your basic salary before any deductions.
SalaryCalculator.estimateDisclaimer: * This is an estimate based on standard 2026 rates.

ThirteenthMonth.title: 13th Month Pay Calculator
ThirteenthMonth.subtitle: Calculate your prorated 13th month pay and check if it exceeds the ₱90k tax exemption limit.
ThirteenthMonth.basicSalaryHint: Exclude overtime, holiday pay, and allowances.
ThirteenthMonth.howComputedDesc: By Philippine Law (P.D. 851), your 13th month pay is strictly 1/12th of the total basic salary you earned within a calendar year.
ThirteenthMonth.taxabilityDesc: Under the TRAIN Law, the 13th month pay and other equivalent bonuses are tax-exempt up to ₱90,000. Any amount exceeding this limit is added to your taxable income for the year.

BpoCalculator.salaryHint: Basic pay lang ha, walay allowances
BpoCalculator.resultsTitle: Mao Ni Ang Breakdown sa Shift Pay Nimo

BudgetCalculator.targetNetPayHint: Pila gyud ang kinahanglan nimo madawat sa bank nimo kada buwan?
BudgetCalculator.grossSalaryNeeded: Gross Salary Nga Dapat Nimo Pangayoon
BudgetCalculator.howItWorksDesc: Gi-reverse namo ang computation. Gi-sum up ang tanan nimong gastos para mahibaw-an ang target net pay, dayon gi-reverse-engineer ang SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG, ug Withholding Tax para makuha ang exact gross salary nga angay nimong pangayoon sa job interview.

CarLoanCalculator.vehiclePriceHint: Ang cash price sa sakyanan nga imong paliton.
CarLoanCalculator.interestRateHint: Typical bank rates kay 8-10%, pero if in-house sa dealer, abot gyud ug 15-20%!
CarLoanCalculator.totalPaid: Total nga Magasto Nimo sa Sakyanan
CarLoanCalculator.bankVsInhouseDesc: Mas barato gyud ang bank financing. Ang in-house sa dealer, kay hilig mo-offer ug 'low down payment' promos pero grabe ka taas ang interest rate (15%+). Pag-apply una sa bangko para maka-save ka!

HomeLoanCalculator.propertyPriceLabel: Presyo sa Balay ug Yuta / Property Price (PHP)
HomeLoanCalculator.propertyPriceHint: Ang market value o selling price sa balay.
HomeLoanCalculator.interestRateHint: Ang home loan rates sa bangko usually naa sa 6% to 8% fixed range.
HomeLoanCalculator.refinancingDesc: Ang bangko kay naay fixed terms (e.g., 1-year o 5-year fixed). Human ana, mag-reprice ang interest rate base sa market rate. Planoha ni og tarong para dili ka makalatan!
